jobs.title: Renewal confirmation
jobs.note: Lifecycle job update replayed after queue serialization fix.

jobs.title: Receipt and lifecycle follow-up
jobs.note: Activation should later trigger receipt, lifecycle confirmation, and recovery-safe fallback instructions from one durable backend lane.

recoveryActions.title: Renewal confirmation
recoveryActions.note: Recovery action replayed after queue serialization fix.

recoveryActions.title: Lifecycle fallback drill
recoveryActions.note: Even healthy accounts should keep a visible fallback path until lifecycle automation is driven by real provider events.

opsJobs.title: Renewal continuity audit
opsJobs.note: Ops lifecycle replayed after queue serialization fix.

opsJobs.title: Failed-charge warning queue
opsJobs.note: Failure warnings should queue support handoff, reminder timing, and downgrade review together instead of relying on one-off billing notes.

opsJobs.title: Grace-period downgrade review
opsJobs.note: Grace-period accounts should keep a review window before fallback access changes are applied or recovery promises are sent.

opsJobs.title: Fallback-access cleanup run
opsJobs.note: Cancellation should preserve invoice history and entitlement traceability while fallback access is applied deliberately.

opsRecoveryActions.title: Failed-charge reminder sequence
opsRecoveryActions.note: Reminder sequencing should stay tied to payment-event truth so billing retries, subscriber messaging, and support timing stay aligned.

opsRecoveryActions.title: Support rescue handoff
opsRecoveryActions.note: High-risk failed-charge accounts should create one deliberate support handoff instead of relying on ad-hoc payment follow-up.

opsRecoveryActions.title: Fallback access review
opsRecoveryActions.note: Fallback access changes should remain reviewable until provider-backed retries and entitlement sync are fully production-grade.
